title: Recording Station
subtitle: Give your parent a voice prompt and let them share their story

prompts.0: Tell me about your childhood home
prompts.1: What was your first job like?
prompts.2: How did you and your partner meet?
prompts.3: What was the hardest moment of your life?
prompts.4: What piece of advice would you give your younger self?
prompts.5: What traditions did your parents teach you?
prompts.6: Describe a typical day when you were young
prompts.7: What made you happiest as a child?
